name: GMK CYL Masterpiece R2
description: Energieschleuder's return to Japanese shokunin culture — six years after the original run. GMK CYL Masterpiece R2 uses RAL 240 40 40 deep blue over white legends, with Katakana glyphs extended across the full navigation cluster and numpad for the first time. Origin TKL base at $99 (Katakana alphas), Roman Base at $125, Precision Kit (numpad) at $25. Seigaiha wave-scale deskmat option. Seven storefronts: KBDfans, Prototypist, Geon Works, Deskhero, SwitchKeys AU, NovelKeys, Oblotzky Industries. Global buy June 5–26 2026; Q4 2026–Q1 2027 fulfillment.
